title: Post Malone Had a Paranormal Experience
summary: A brief discussion about Post Malone's visit to Skinwalker Ranch, where he and his armed security detail reportedly witnessed a spectral image moving through the location. The clip describes the unusual energy at the ranch and the paranormal experience that occurred.

key_claims.claim: Post Malone visited Skinwalker Ranch with a heavily armed security detail
Post Malone and his security detail saw a spectral image dart through and up through the roof at Skinwalker Ranch
